banner.title: Privacy and cookies
banner.description: We use cookies to collect information about how you use our website. We use this information to make the website work as well as possible and see how we can improve our services.

success.title: Settings saved
success.description:
Your cookie preferences have been saved on this device for the next 90 days.

If you wish to change these at any time see our cookies page.

response_body.introduction: We use cookies to make our website work and to ensure you get the best experience when you use it. We'd also like to set optional analytics cookies to help us improve it and to monitor use. We won't set optional cookies unless you enable them. Using this tool will set a cookie on your device to remember your preferences. Learn more about the cookies we use.

essential.name: Essential cookies
essential.description: We need these to make the website work, so these will always be there, but don't worry they are good cookies and don't collect any information about you.

manageable.name: Google Analytics
manageable.description:
These cookies allow us to count the number of visitors using the website and see how they use it. They don't collect any information that identifies you.

We only use this to improve how our website works. Google Universal Analytics has been superseded by Google Tag Manager, avoid all Google tracking disable both Google Analytics and Google Tag Manager options.

​

manageable.name: Facebook Pixel
manageable.description:
Facebook Pixel is an analytics tool that allows us to measure the effectiveness of our posts and advertising on Facebook by understanding the actions that you take on our website.

This can also be used to target Facebook adverts based on the pages you view.

manageable.name: Google Tag Manager
manageable.description:
These cookies allow us to manage and track specific tasks or events carried out on our website.

Google Tag Manager also loads Google Analytics GA4, ReciteMe assistive toolbar and Clarity Analytics. These cookies help us understand how people use our website. They show us:

  • what people click on
  • how far they scroll
  • where they move their mouse
  • which pages they visit
  • the number of visitors to the website

They also tell us what kind of device is used, where the person is, and what language they prefer.

These cookies do not collect your name or any personal details. They are not used on parts of the site where you need to log in. We only use this information to make the website better.

manageable.name: Orlo
manageable.description: We use Orlo to manage our social media accounts. This cookie helps us to track how our posts perform and link back to our website.

manageable.name: Council Advertising Network
manageable.description: These cookies are used by partners in the Council Advertising Network to collect your personal or non-personal data which is then used to provide you with interest-based and behavioural advertising.
